fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Extracts the path segment between two distances along the path and appends it to the specified path builder.

params.stop: The distance along the path at which the segment ends.
params.start: The distance along the path at which the segment begins.
params.dst: The path builder to which the segment is appended.
params.startWithMoveTo: true to prepend a move-to command to the beginning of the segment; false to append the segment without a leading move.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
